mapper.select:
SELECT p.popup_seq ,p.title ,p.content ,p.status ,p.sort_seq ,p.start_at ,p.end_at ,p.created_at ,p.updated_at FROM event.popups p
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.status = 'published' AND (p.start_at IS NULL OR p.start_at <= NOW()) AND (p.end_at IS NULL OR p.end_at >= NOW())
ORDER BY p.sort_seq ASC, p.popup_seq DESC
